naturalMeaning: 稍后再讨论或跟进某事，不是真的转圈，而是回头再聊
example: We don't have time to get into that now — let's circle back after the demo.
exampleTranslation: 我们现在没时间深入聊那个，等演示结束后再回头讨论。

naturalMeaning: 暂时搁置这个话题，先记下来以后再说
example: This is important but not urgent, so let's put a pin in it and move on.
exampleTranslation: 这个事儿重要但不紧急，我们先搁置一下推进下一个话题。

naturalMeaning: 达成共识，确保大家理解一致
example: Let's get on the same page before we present this to the client.
exampleTranslation: 在给客户展示之前我们先对齐一下口径。

naturalMeaning: 简短地沟通或同步一下信息
example: Let's touch base after lunch to see where things stand.
exampleTranslation: 午饭后简短碰一下，看看进展如何。

naturalMeaning: 请对方发送一个会议邀请（'shoot'在这里是非常随意的语气）
example: Just shoot me a meeting invite and I'll put it on my calendar.
exampleTranslation: 直接发个会议邀请给我，我放日历上。

naturalMeaning: 找时间简短聊一聊，通常是非正式的
example: Do you have 15 minutes this afternoon? Let's grab some time to sync up.
exampleTranslation: 今天下午有15分钟吗？咱们找时间对齐一下。

expression: I've got a hard stop at
literalTranslation: 我在某个时间有个硬停
naturalMeaning: 表示某个时间必须离开会议，不可更改
example: Just a heads up, I've got a hard stop at 3:30 for another call.
exampleTranslation: 提前说一下，我三点半必须下线，还有个电话会议。

naturalMeaning: 这周非常忙，日程排满了，暗示不太能加新会议
example: I'm swamped this week — can we push the sync to Monday?
exampleTranslation: 我这周忙疯了，能把同步会推到周一吗？

naturalMeaning: 在已经排满的日程里硬塞一个会议或任务
example: I don't have much time, but I can squeeze it in between standup and lunch.
exampleTranslation: 我时间不多，但可以在站会和午饭之间硬挤出来。

naturalMeaning: 正式开始一个会议或活动
example: Alright everyone, let's kick things off — thanks for jumping on.
exampleTranslation: 好了各位，我们开始吧，谢谢大家上线。

naturalMeaning: 开始做某件事，启动会议或项目
example: We've got a lot to cover, so let's get the ball rolling.
exampleTranslation: 今天要聊的很多，咱们开始吧。

naturalMeaning: 列出今天要讨论的主题或事项
example: On the agenda today we have three items: the Q2 review, headcount planning, and the new onboarding flow.
exampleTranslation: 今天的议程有三项：Q2回顾、人员编制规划和新员工入职流程。

naturalMeaning: 直接开始深入讨论，不废话直接进入正题
example: We're all here, so let's dive in — Alice, the floor is yours.
exampleTranslation: 人都齐了，我们直接开始吧——Alice，交给你了。

naturalMeaning: 确认所有人都有幻灯片/演示材料（deck = slide deck）
example: Does everyone have the deck? I shared it in the calendar invite.
exampleTranslation: 大家都有演示文稿了吗？我发在会议邀请里了。

naturalMeaning: 向迟到的参会者简要说明当前进度
example: For those who just joined, we just wrapped up the sprint retro and are moving on to planning.
exampleTranslation: 给刚上线的同事说明一下，我们刚开完sprint回顾，现在进入规划环节。

naturalMeaning: 表示会议会高效简洁，不会拖堂
example: I know everyone's busy, so we'll keep this tight — 20 minutes max.
exampleTranslation: 我知道大家都很忙，所以我们会控制时间——最多20分钟。

naturalMeaning: 明确说明本次会议的核心目的
example: The main goal today is to decide on the tech stack for the new microservice.
exampleTranslation: 今天的主要目标是为新的微服务确定技术栈。

naturalMeaning: 提供背景信息或上下文，为后续讨论做铺垫
example: Before we jump into the numbers, let me set the stage with some context on last quarter.
exampleTranslation: 在我们看具体数字之前，我先介绍一下上个季度的背景情况。

naturalMeaning: 快速浏览一遍今天的议程安排
example: Let's run through the agenda real quick so everyone knows what to expect.
exampleTranslation: 我们快速过一遍议程，让大家心里有数。

expression: that's the last item on the agenda
literalTranslation: 那是议程上的最后一项
naturalMeaning: 表示这是议程中最后一个要讨论的事项
example: We just need to finalize the budget, and that's the last item on the agenda.
exampleTranslation: 我们只需要敲定预算，那就是议程上的最后一项了。

naturalMeaning: 暂时搁置一个话题不讨论（table在美式英语中意为'搁置'）
example: This is getting into territory we don't have data for, so let's table that for now.
exampleTranslation: 这个已经涉及我们没有数据的领域了，先搁置吧。

naturalMeaning: 过渡到下一个讨论话题的简洁说法
example: Next up is the roadmap review — Mike, do you want to take it?
exampleTranslation: 接下来是路线图评审——Mike，你来带吗？

naturalMeaning: 切换话题，进入下一个议题
example: I think we've exhausted that topic. Let's move on to the UX changes.
exampleTranslation: 我觉得那个话题讨论得差不多了。我们进入UX改动部分。

expression: we have a lot to get through
naturalMeaning: 今天议程排得很满，需要抓紧时间
example: We have a lot to get through, so I'll try to keep everyone on track.
exampleTranslation: 今天要过的内容很多，我会尽量让大家不跑偏。

naturalMeaning: 讨论偏离了主题，跑题了
example: Sorry, I didn't mean to go off on a tangent — back to the main topic.
exampleTranslation: 抱歉，我没想跑题——回到正题上。

naturalMeaning: 这个话题不适合在本次会议上深入讨论，建议会后单独沟通
example: That's a good point but it's out of scope for today. Let's take that offline.
exampleTranslation: 这个点不错，但不在今天范围内。我们私下再聊。

naturalMeaning: 时间不多了，需要快速完成剩余的议程项目
example: We're running low on time, so let's speed through the rest of the items.
exampleTranslation: 时间不多了，我们快速把剩下的过完。

naturalMeaning: 总结最核心的要点或结论，去掉所有细节后的关键信息
example: The bottom line is we're two weeks behind schedule and we need to push the launch.
exampleTranslation: 底线就是我们的进度落后了两周，需要推迟上线。

naturalMeaning: 数据非常清晰直观，不需要额外解释
example: Look at the conversion rate — 3.2% to 12.8% in one month. The numbers speak for themselves.
exampleTranslation: 看这个转化率——一个月从3.2%涨到12.8%。数字说明一切。

naturalMeaning: 聚焦到某个具体的数据点或细节上深入分析
example: The overall numbers look good, but let's zoom in on the APAC region specifically.
exampleTranslation: 总体数据看起来不错，但我们放大看一下亚太地区的情况。

naturalMeaning: 与去年同期相比的同比数据，非常常用的商业术语
example: Revenue is up 23% year over year, which is above our target.
exampleTranslation: 营收同比增长23%，超出了我们的目标。

naturalMeaning: 与上个季度相比的环比数据
example: We saw a 5% decline in active users quarter over quarter, which is concerning.
exampleTranslation: 活跃用户环比下降了5%，这有点令人担忧。

expression: take it with a grain of salt
naturalMeaning: 对数据或信息保持审慎态度，不要完全相信
example: The survey results are interesting, but take them with a grain of salt — the sample size was only 30 people.
exampleTranslation: 问卷结果挺有意思的，但别全信——样本量才30个人。

expression: it's trending in the right direction
literalTranslation: 它正在往正确的方向移动
naturalMeaning: 数据或指标在向好的方向发展
example: Latency is down and NPS is up — all the metrics are trending in the right direction.
exampleTranslation: 延迟降了，NPS涨了——所有指标都在往好的方向走。

expression: what jumps out at me is
naturalMeaning: 表达自己在看数据时注意到的、最引人关注的点
example: What jumps out at me is the spike in API errors right after the last deployment.
exampleTranslation: 让我注意的是，上一次部署之后API错误出现了飙升。

naturalMeaning: 深入挖掘某个数据点的细节
example: The aggregate numbers look fine, but let's drill down into the error rates per region.
exampleTranslation: 总体数据看起来没问题，但我们深入看一下每个区域的错误率。

expression: what are your thoughts on this
naturalMeaning: 征求对方的意见或看法，非常常见的会议用语
example: We've been considering moving to Kubernetes — what are your thoughts on this?
exampleTranslation: 我们一直在考虑迁移到Kubernetes——你对此有什么看法？

expression: I'd love to hear your take
naturalMeaning: 真诚地邀请某人分享他们的观点（'take'在此指观点/立场）
example: You've been through a similar migration before — I'd love to hear your take on this.
exampleTranslation: 你之前经历过类似的迁移——我很想听听你的看法。

naturalMeaning: 分享自己的想法并寻求对方反馈，强调'碰撞'的过程
example: I'm still early in the design phase, just bouncing ideas off you to see what sticks.
exampleTranslation: 我还在设计初期，就是想跟你碰撞一下想法看看哪些可行。

literalTranslation: 那个跟你产生共鸣了吗
naturalMeaning: 询问对方是否认同、理解或有同感
example: The idea is to reduce friction in the checkout flow — does that resonate with you?
exampleTranslation: 思路是减少结账流程中的摩擦——你对此有同感吗？

naturalMeaning: 故意提出相反观点来测试论证的合理性，不是真的反对
example: Let me play devil's advocate here — what if the user doesn't want to share their location?
exampleTranslation: 我来唱个反调——如果用户不想分享位置信息怎么办？

naturalMeaning: 向整个群体征求意见，典型的开放式提问
example: I've laid out the pros and cons of each approach. What does everyone think?
exampleTranslation: 我已经列出了每种方案的优缺点。大家怎么看？

expression: throw it out to the room
naturalMeaning: 把问题开放给所有参会者，邀请大家讨论
example: I don't have a clear answer on this one, so I'll throw it out to the room.
exampleTranslation: 这个问题我没有明确答案，抛给大家来讨论。

naturalMeaning: 发表意见或贡献观点，尤其是指望某人给出专业看法
example: Jen, you've worked with this vendor before — could you weigh in?
exampleTranslation: Jen，你之前跟这个供应商合作过——能说说你的看法吗？

expression: I want to open it up for discussion
naturalMeaning: 正式邀请所有参会者发表意见，通常在展示完信息后使用
example: That's all I have for the proposal. I want to open it up for discussion — any questions or concerns?
exampleTranslation: 方案的内容我就讲完了。现在开放给大家讨论——有什么问题或顾虑吗？

expression: I see where you're coming from, but
literalTranslation: 我明白你是从哪里来的，但是
naturalMeaning: 先表示理解对方的立场，再委婉提出不同意见
example: I see where you're coming from, but I think the engineering cost here is too high for the payoff.
exampleTranslation: 我理解你的想法，但我认为这里的技术成本太高，回报不成比例。

expression: I'm not sure I agree with that
naturalMeaning: 非常礼貌地表示不同意，语气温和不直接冲突
example: I'm not sure I agree with that timeline — three weeks feels optimistic given the scope.
exampleTranslation: 我不太同意那个时间线——考虑到范围，三周有点过于乐观了。

expression: I'd push back on that a little
literalTranslation: 我会在那个上稍微往后推一下
naturalMeaning: 礼貌地表示异议，'push back'是商业场合中非常常用的委婉反驳
example: I'd push back on that a little — our data shows users actually prefer the simpler UI.
exampleTranslation: 我对此有点异议——我们的数据显示用户其实更喜欢更简洁的界面。

expression: fair point, but have we considered
literalTranslation: 有道理，但我们考虑过吗
naturalMeaning: 先认可对方观点有道理，再提出一个被忽略的角度
example: Fair point, but have we considered the cost of maintaining two codebases?
exampleTranslation: 有道理，但我们考虑过维护两套代码库的成本吗？

expression: I see it a bit differently
naturalMeaning: 委婉表达不同意，语气比直接说'我不同意'温和很多
example: Interesting perspective. I see it a bit differently — let me explain why.
exampleTranslation: 很有意思的角度。我的看法略有不同——我来解释一下原因。

naturalMeaning: 先声明自己不是故意抬杠，再提出不同观点
example: Not to be contrarian, but I think going all-in on one platform is risky.
exampleTranslation: 不是要跟你唱反调，但我认为把所有资源押在一个平台上有风险。

expression: I hear you, but I think we're missing something
literalTranslation: 我听到了你，但我觉得我们漏了什么
naturalMeaning: 认可对方说的内容，但指出还有被忽略的重要因素
example: I hear you, but I think we're missing something — what about the impact on existing users?
exampleTranslation: 我听到了，但我觉得我们漏了一点——对现有用户的影响怎么考虑？

expression: that's one way to look at it
naturalMeaning: 表面认可但实际上委婉表示不认同，暗示对方看的视角有限
example: That's one way to look at it, but I think there's a bigger picture we need to consider.
exampleTranslation: 那是一种看法，但我认为还有更大的全局需要考量。

expression: I think we need to pump the brakes on that
literalTranslation: 我觉得我们需要踩刹车
naturalMeaning: 委婉表示推进太快了，需要放慢速度重新评估
example: I think we need to pump the brakes on this rollout until we fix the security vulnerability.
exampleTranslation: 我觉得这个上线需要踩个刹车，先把安全漏洞修了再说。

naturalMeaning: 最终确定一个决定，不再改变
example: Everyone agrees on the pricing model? Great, let's lock it in.
exampleTranslation: 大家都同意这个定价模式了吗？好，就这么定了。

naturalMeaning: 大家意见一致，没有分歧
example: Okay, so we all agree the priority is fixing the login flow — we're on the same page.
exampleTranslation: 好，所以大家都同意优先修复登录流程——我们的意见一致。

expression: I think we have a consensus
naturalMeaning: 确认大家意见基本一致，可以做决定了
example: I think we have a consensus — we'll go with option B and revisit in three months.
exampleTranslation: 我认为大家达成了共识——选方案B，三个月后再复盘。

naturalMeaning: 所有数据和情况都指向同一个结论
example: All signs point to a Q3 launch, so let's start planning backward from that date.
exampleTranslation: 所有迹象都指向Q3上线，我们就从这个日期开始倒推做计划吧。

expression: we need to get aligned on this
literalTranslation: 我们需要在这个上对齐
naturalMeaning: 大家对这个事情的理解或立场不一致，需要拉齐
example: There's clearly some disagreement here, so we need to get aligned on this before moving forward.
exampleTranslation: 这里明显有分歧，我们需要在这个问题上对齐之后再推进。

naturalMeaning: 快速了解每个人的立场或感受，类似于'大家现在什么态度'
example: We've heard a lot of different opinions — let's take a pulse check around the room.
exampleTranslation: 我们听到了很多不同的意见——来感受一下在座各位的立场。

naturalMeaning: 一个关键的二元决策点，决定项目是否推进
example: After the beta results come in next week, we'll make a go / no-go decision on the full rollout.
exampleTranslation: 下周beta测试结果出来后，我们就决定是否全面上线。

naturalMeaning: 做出最终判断或决定（可以指做出决策，也可以指结束某事）
example: We've been debating for 20 minutes — let's just call it and go with option A.
exampleTranslation: 我们已经争论了20分钟了——就定了吧，选方案A。

naturalMeaning: 表达自己的倾向性意见，语气柔和，不是强硬表态
example: After hearing everyone out, I'm leaning towards the two-week sprint approach.
exampleTranslation: 听了大家的意见后，我倾向于采用两周冲刺的方式。

naturalMeaning: 谁负责这件事？'own'在此意为'负责/承担'
example: The API documentation needs to be updated — who owns that?
exampleTranslation: API文档需要更新了——这是谁负责的？

naturalMeaning: 会后与某人进一步沟通或追踪某个事项
example: I'll follow up with the design team to get the mockups by Friday.
exampleTranslation: 我会跟设计团队跟进，周五前拿到设计稿。

naturalMeaning: 负责牵头做某事，扮演主力角色（源自军事用语）
example: Sarah, do you want to take point on this and coordinate with the vendors?
exampleTranslation: Sarah，你来牵头这个，跟供应商协调可以吗？

literalTranslation: 那个的预计到达时间是什么
naturalMeaning: 询问某件事预计什么时候能完成（ETA = estimated time of arrival）
example: The database migration is blocking us — what's the ETA on that?
exampleTranslation: 数据库迁移在挡着我们——预计什么时候能完成？

expression: let's put some deadlines on these
naturalMeaning: 为列出的任务设定具体的完成时间
example: We've got a solid list of action items — now let's put some deadlines on these.
exampleTranslation: 我们有了一个不错的行动项清单——现在给它们加上截止日期。

naturalMeaning: 我会把相关的人拉进来，让他们知晓或参与
example: This needs legal approval, so I'll loop in the stakeholders from the legal team.
exampleTranslation: 这个需要法务批准，我会把法务团队的人拉进来。

expression: I'll draft the recap and send it out
literalTranslation: 我会起草会议总结并发送出去
naturalMeaning: 负责写会议纪要并分发给参会者（recap = recapitulation，会议总结）
example: Thanks everyone. I'll draft the recap and send it out within the hour.
exampleTranslation: 谢谢大家。我会在一小时内写好会议总结发给大家。

expression: let me take a stab at it
naturalMeaning: 我来尝试做某事（语气随意，表示愿意尝试但未必能成功）
example: Nobody has experience with this library? Alright, let me take a stab at it.
exampleTranslation: 没人用过这个库？好吧，我来试试看。

expression: are you good to take this on
literalTranslation: 你准备好接下这个了吗
naturalMeaning: 确认某人是否愿意且有能力承担某项任务
example: We need someone to refactor the auth module — are you good to take this on?
exampleTranslation: 我们需要有人重构auth模块——你能接手这个吗？

naturalMeaning: 约定下周再次沟通或跟进，是最常见的收尾用语之一
example: We've made good progress. Let's circle back next week after we've each done our research.
exampleTranslation: 今天进展不错。下周各自调研完之后再碰。

naturalMeaning: 在会议结束时概括核心要点
example: To sum it up: we're delaying the launch by two weeks, and Sarah will own the communication plan.
exampleTranslation: 总结一下：上线推迟两周，Sarah负责沟通方案。

literalTranslation: 我觉得我们覆盖了所有内容
naturalMeaning: 表示会议要讨论的内容已经全部讨论过了
example: Any last questions? No? I think we covered everything on the agenda.
exampleTranslation: 还有最后的问题吗？没有了？我觉得议程上的内容都覆盖到了。

naturalMeaning: 正面评价本次会议讨论的质量
example: Great discussion, everyone — I really appreciate the different perspectives we heard today.
exampleTranslation: 大家讨论得很好——非常感谢今天听到的各种不同视角。

expression: I'll send out the recap notes
literalTranslation: 我会把总结笔记发出去
naturalMeaning: 会后发送会议纪要给所有参会者
example: I'll send out the recap notes by end of day — let me know if I miss anything.
exampleTranslation: 今天下班前我会把会议总结发出来——漏了什么告诉我。

naturalMeaning: 表示自己讲完了、没有其他要补充的了
example: That's all I had for the roadmap update. Back to you, Jess.
exampleTranslation: 路线图更新我就说这么多。交回给你，Jess。

expression: let's pick this up next time
naturalMeaning: 时间到了，剩下的内容留到下次会议继续讨论
example: We're out of time, so let's pick this up next time. Same time Thursday?
exampleTranslation: 时间到了，剩下的我们下次继续。周四同一时间？

naturalMeaning: 在会议结尾列出每个人接下来需要做的事情
example: Before we wrap up, let's confirm the action items are: Mike owns the spec, Lisa handles QA, and I'll do the stakeholder update.
exampleTranslation: 结束之前，确认一下行动项：Mike负责规格文档，Lisa负责测试，我来做相关方汇报。
